hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.pbxproj) printf '{"systemMessage":"⚠️  Editing project.pbxproj — fragile file, double-check the diff"}\n';; esac; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.swift) xcrun swift-format -i "$f" 2>/dev/null;; esac; }
